blockingIssues.description: The rerun review found that `apps/cli/src/cli.ts` still defaults `localRepoPath` to `parsed.flags.repo` when `--local-skill-path` is omitted, so `fleet sync <skill> --repo <remote-path>` still validates `<remote-path>/<skill>` on the local machine and does not fully resolve the original `cli-sync-command` path-separation defect.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace the commander.js/yargs parser instruction with the current hand-rolled parser pattern used in `apps/cli/src/cli.ts`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `fix-cli-unknown-host` and `fix-cli-repo-paths` again flagged that `.factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md` still tells workers to use commander.js or yargs even though the CLI is intentionally hand-rolled and `.factory/library/architecture.md` already documents that architecture.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update manual verification and live-test guidance so write-path validation uses isolated sandboxes instead of the shared `~/repos/shuvbot-skills` repo on test hosts, or restrict auth validation to read-only checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-cli-live-ssh-test` review found the new live pull test hard-codes `~/repos/shuvbot-skills` on `shuvtest`, while mission guidance marks existing skills repos on test hosts as read-only. The current skill guidance still encourages `fleet pull shuvtest` style verification, which creates that mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to record deviations whenever they do not actually follow the skill's tests-first/TDD sequence, so scrutiny can trust `skillFeedback.followedProcedure`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-cli-status-hostname` review found the worker changed production code before adding the regression test but still reported `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`, which makes the current skill-following signal unreliable.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the coding convention guidance to match the current codebase by importing `Schema` from `effect` instead of `@effect/schema`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-cli-unknown-host` review found `AGENTS.md` still says to use `Schema` from `@effect/schema`, while `.factory/library/architecture.md` and the current source use `Schema` from `effect`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a new library note saying the CLI uses a hand-rolled parser instead of commander.js/yargs.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in `.factory/library/architecture.md`, so this should be handled as a skill update rather than another library entry

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a new library note about importing `Schema` from `effect`.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in `.factory/library/architecture.md`; the gap is in mission guidance, so this belongs as an AGENTS.md recommendation instead

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a new library note saying shared test-host skill repos are read-only.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in mission `AGENTS.md`, so the remaining issue is conflicting worker-skill guidance rather than missing factual library knowledge
